context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: State when food bowl is empty, prompting player to feed
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60, on perch at y=80, looking toward food bowl at (16, 100)
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when food_level reaches 0, displays until player refills food bowl

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head turned toward empty food bowl, expectant posture
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art with organic hand-drawn feel, no gradients
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on crest, beak, and body silhouette

animation.description: Frame 1: looking at bowl, Frame 2: head tilts slightly, Frame 3: looks at bowl, Frame 4: looks toward player (front)

visual_specification.details: Head rotated approximately 20° toward food bowl position (left side of screen), eyes focused downward-left, crest in normal position, body slightly leaning forward, one eye more visible than other due to head turn (2x2px visible eye)

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_eating (looking vs actively eating), echo_idle (head orientation), echo_dirty (different type of discomfort)

explicit_negations: No color changes to indicate hunger
